strengths: Successfully introduced and positioned loops around target appendages
Demonstrated proper loop opening technique with the loop applier
Maintained good instrument coordination during positioning phases
weaknesses: Failed to complete the tail cutting phase within the time limit
Struggled with final loop tightening and securing sequence
Did not achieve proper closure before attempting tail cut

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: 10 repetitions of opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the tail cutting phase within the time limit

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching
drills.targets_weakness: Struggled with final loop tightening and securing sequence

drills.name: Tail-cut finish drill
drills.description: 10 secure placements followed by controlled tail cuts without disturbing the loop
drills.targets_weakness: Did not achieve proper closure before attempting tail cut

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on completing the full sequence consistently before pursuing speed improvements. Practice the tail cutting phase separately to build confidence in the final steps.
